error_signature: Shopify webhook URL includes a port number
title: Shopify webhook not triggering due to port number
symptom: Shopify is not triggering the order creation event in n8n, resulting in no executions. The webhook URL is incorrectly configured with a port number.
applies_when: n8n is hosted on a public domain
not_this_if: Webhook URL does not include a port number
n8n is not behind a reverse proxy
root_cause: Shopify requires the webhook URL to be publicly accessible without a port number. If a port number is included, Shopify cannot reach the n8n instance, leading to failed webhook triggers.
fix_steps: Update the n8n environment variables to set WEBHOOK_URL without a port number.
Ensure N8N_HOST and N8N_PROTOCOL are correctly set to match the public domain.
Restart the n8n instance to apply the changes.
agent_instruction: Update the n8n environment variables to remove the port from the webhook URL and restart n8n.
